summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People & Organizational Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people development—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

Develop {prog|learning materials}—guides, handouts, and workflows—for 70+ cross-functional staff, reducing onboarding time by 75%
Execute a new {prog|training program} by instructing live sessions and producing videos that reached 500+ participants
Facilitate {prog|training} webinars for 600+ participants, boosting program understanding and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate

Analyzed 2,000+ employee responses, reporting insights and recommending actions to the C-suite for employee engagement
Elevated employee experience through projects focused on engagement, rewards & recognition, survey development, and {prog|L&D}
Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership {prog|workshop} for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to other global locations
Optimized onboarding processes across global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities

Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management

changeLog: 2026-05-30: Tailored for OHSU — Learning & Organizational Development (Portland-local hospital). Cap-exempt H-1B sponsor. Location → Portland, OR (local). Summary → 'People & Organizational Development' umbrella, systematic approaches, 'improve people development.' InGenius FIRST + L&D-leaning: needs assessments → design programs, develop learning materials/handouts (JD: 'creates all materials such as handouts'), instruct live sessions + produce videos (JD: 'instructs classes in formal instructor-led training, virtual and face to face'), 78% enrollment. NextGen reordered to lead with internal-training consultations; keeps DEI/Inclusive Leadership (JD emphasizes anti-racist org valuing DEI&B). Vestas keeps Inclusive Leadership workshop. Skills → Learning Systems line adds Adult Learning Principles (JD: 'applies adult learning principles'). Strong fit: design+deliver learning solutions, adult learning, materials creation, OD strategy, DEI alignment, healthcare context (NextGen Healthcare adjacency).
